questions.q: At the 98th Academy Awards held on March 15th 2026, which veteran actor won the Oscar for Best Supporting Role for his performance in the film 'One Battle After Another'?
The 2026 Winter Paralympics officially concluded in Italy on March 15th 2026. Which country finished at the very top of the overall medal table with 15 gold medals?
Environment Canada issued warnings on March 15th 2026 for a significant winter storm bringing snow and freezing rain to which region of the country?
Conservative Leader Pierre Poilievre unveiled a major new 'Auto Plan' in Windsor on March 15th 2026. What is the primary goal of this policy regarding the U.S. market?
options: To secure tariff-free access for Canadian-made cars
To increase the federal tax on gasoline
To move all car manufacturing to Western Canada

questions.q: According to the National Day Calendar, March 15th is humorously known as 'Everything You Think Is ______ Day,' a day where people are encouraged to admit they might not always be right.
